items.title: Absolute Cinema
items.summary: I don’t write reviews but I just love this game too much. This is a phenomenal game with stunning graphics. There’s a large range of characters and minimal fan service. The game is extremely generous, within ≈4 months of playing, I have most of the standard banner characters. While some grinding is involved, it’s not enough to ruin the gameplay. The story is peak, and although some parts are translated weirdly, it doesn’t affect a lot. This game is also not afraid to show death and horror which makes for some absolutely incredible storytelling. The tutorials don’t explain the battle mechanics too well but if you keep playing, you get to understand the mechanics. The fandom is also super nice and helpful, offering advice and guides on how to play. This is an extremely well made game and I’m sad it doesn’t get more recognition. I love this game.
items.author: Sir Knightferrow
